items.caption: A comic strip titled "DONALD TENTÉ!" featuring Donald Duck and Uncle Scrooge. Donald is carrying bags of items from sales while Scrooge looks on.
items.md: ![A comic strip titled "DONALD TENTÉ!" featuring Donald Duck and Uncle Scrooge. Donald is carrying bags of items from sales while Scrooge looks on.](CBatAotCB-203_page_1_image_1_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald Duck walking past a store window with signs saying "SOLDES", "PRIX SACRIFIÉS", "ÉCONOMISEZ!", and "RABAIS 80%". Donald says: "ZUT ET ZUT! QUAND JE VOIS CES PRIX, JE NE PEUX PAS RÉSISTER!"
items.md: ![Donald Duck walking past a store window with signs saying "SOLDES", "PRIX SACRIFIÉS", "ÉCONOMISEZ!", and "RABAIS 80%". Donald says: "ZUT ET ZUT! QUAND JE VOIS CES PRIX, JE NE PEUX PAS RÉSISTER!"](CBatAotCB-203_page_1_image_2_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald shows Scrooge a small device. Donald says: "REGARDE! J'AI ACHETÉ UN APPAREIL À ASTIQUER LES ŒUFS À LA COQUE DONT JE N'AI PAS LE MOINDRE BESOIN!"
items.md: ![Donald shows Scrooge a small device. Donald says: "REGARDE! J'AI ACHETÉ UN APPAREIL À ASTIQUER LES ŒUFS À LA COQUE DONT JE N'AI PAS LE MOINDRE BESOIN!"](CBatAotCB-203_page_1_image_5_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald is now carrying more bags. A sign says "FREIN SUR LES PRIX". Donald says: "UNE MINUTE PLUS TARD! JE ME SUIS ENCORE LAISSÉ AVOIR! QUATRE KILOS DE LESSIVE SUPER-RÉCURANTE!"
items.md: ![Donald is now carrying more bags. A sign says "FREIN SUR LES PRIX". Donald says: "UNE MINUTE PLUS TARD! JE ME SUIS ENCORE LAISSÉ AVOIR! QUATRE KILOS DE LESSIVE SUPER-RÉCURANTE!"](CBatAotCB-203_page_1_image_3_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald looks distressed, talking to Scrooge. Donald says: "COMMENT VEUX-TU QUE JE M'EN SORTE? TOUS LES MAGASINS ANNONCENT DES SOLDES!"
items.md: ![Donald looks distressed, talking to Scrooge. Donald says: "COMMENT VEUX-TU QUE JE M'EN SORTE? TOUS LES MAGASINS ANNONCENT DES SOLDES!"](CBatAotCB-203_page_1_image_8_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Scrooge points towards a shop. Scrooge says: "ATTENDS! JE VOIS UNE OCCASION DONT TU AS RÉELLEMENT BESOIN!"
items.md: ![Scrooge points towards a shop. Scrooge says: "ATTENDS! JE VOIS UNE OCCASION DONT TU AS RÉELLEMENT BESOIN!"](CBatAotCB-203_page_1_image_7_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Scrooge leads Donald toward a shop with signs "SOLDES", "AFFAIRES", and "SELLERIE TOUT POUR LE CHEVAL". Scrooge says: "UN PETIT OBJET QUI T'ÉVITERA LA RUINE!"
items.md: ![Scrooge leads Donald toward a shop with signs "SOLDES", "AFFAIRES", and "SELLERIE TOUT POUR LE CHEVAL". Scrooge says: "UN PETIT OBJET QUI T'ÉVITERA LA RUINE!"](CBatAotCB-203_page_1_image_6_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald is now wearing a horse bridle with blinkers, preventing him from seeing the shops. A sign says "ON LIQUIDE". Scrooge says: "EH BIEN, VOILÀ! COMME ÇA, TU NE SERAS PAS TENTÉ!"
items.md: ![Donald is now wearing a horse bridle with blinkers, preventing him from seeing the shops. A sign says "ON LIQUIDE". Scrooge says: "EH BIEN, VOILÀ! COMME ÇA, TU NE SERAS PAS TENTÉ!"](CBatAotCB-203_page_1_image_4_v2.jpg)
The "bridle" gag—intended for Uncle Scrooge No. 19 but not published there—as it was published in France in 1975; ©Walt Disney Productions.
items.value: The "bridle" gag—intended for Uncle Scrooge No. 19 but not published there—as it was published in France in 1975; ©Walt Disney Productions.
